name: workflow transition that fails midway leaves the previous state intact for recovery
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"current_state":"plan","history":[]}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/transition.sh" --to build --simulate-failure mid-write --state-file .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q '"current_state":"plan"' .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && echo recovered 1>&2
